eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Shasta, CA; at 1:13 PM on JUL 13, 2026 Effective until 5:13 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Shasta County Sheriffs office has issued a mandatory evacuation order for all residents in the area of Happy Hills Rd. in Happy Valley due to a wild fire. The current zones are HAP-7490 and COT-9520, all residents in the area of happy hills and Gwendolyn lane are required to evacuate immediately. Evacuate now
